title: Secret Bytes, Constant-Time Decisions, and Memory Lifecycle · Execution Trace: Crypto Go Secret Custody
summary: A Go service converts secrets to immutable strings, logs parse failures with raw material, compares tags with ordinary equality, and promises memory erasure the runtime cannot prove. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the secret custody increment in secret custody and comparison protocol. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causa…
objectives: Trace secret creation, copies, aliases, use, retention, rotation, destruction limits, logs, crashes, backups, and ownership across Go boundaries.
Separate public unique salts, unpredictable bearer tokens, nonces, IVs, seeds, and secret keys by their exact guarantees.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Secret Custody · Theory Crypto Go Secret Custody
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 6887 during a signed release review. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound secret copies, constant-time comparison scope, redaction, and honest erasure claims; record key custody, terminal failure, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk ownership; then swap the role, tenant, recipient, algorithm, or context and prove domain separation. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Trace secret creation, copies, aliases, use, retention, rotation, destruction limits, logs, crashes, backups, and ownership across Go boundaries.
